mapper.sql: id, project_id, title, status, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
id, project_id, session_id, role, question, answer, route_mode, references_json, feedback_json, status, task_id, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.insert: insert into qa_session (project_id, title, status, created_by, updated_by) values (#{projectId}, #{title}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.select: select from qa_session where id = #{sessionId} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update qa_message set answer = #{answer}, route_mode = #{routeMode}, references_json = #{referencesJson}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select from qa_message where id = #{messageId} and deleted = 0
select from qa_message where session_id = #{sessionId} and deleted = 0 order by created_at asc, id asc
